figures.caption: Table 1. Summary of readability measures used in this study. |S|, |W |, and |Syl| denote the number of sentences, words, and syllables in the text, respectively. |DCDW | is the number of difficult words after excluding Dale-Chall’s list of 3k common words.
Table 4: Pairwise semantic overlap across LLM-generated CQ sets.
